titleStmt.title: SII 34.59: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 59. Tiruvaigāvūr, Papanasam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bilvanātēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Dēvarāya-Mahārāya, Śaka 1351, Saumya, Vṛśchika, badi 10, Monday, Hasta = A.D. 1429, October 21, Monday.

This is said to be a solidarity (orimai) deed made by a big assembly of the sabhaiyār of Śrī-parāntaka-nāḍu of Iṉṉambar-nāḍu a unit of Vikkiramachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu on the north bank and and the valaṅgai-98 and the iḍaṅgai-98 communities opposing the unjust taxation of the government and the exploiting nature of the jīvitam holders. The assembly decided that hereafter they should not yield to the official and other exploitation and should pay the government taxes (irājagaram iṟai-muṟaimai) on their land and on various professions as fixed in this meeting. The detailed enumeration of the rates of taxes is given. It is said that the assembled members came to the decision encouraged by an earlier revolt of their brethren elsewhere in several nāḍus of Vaḻudalampaṭṭu Uchāvaḍi. To celebrate the solidarity achievement, the assembly decided to institute a service named Periyanāṭṭāṉ-sandhi in the temple of Tiruvaigāvuḍaiya-nāyaṉār (where the inscription is put up) with income from a vēli of land in each of the temple villages (taḷigai ūr).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
hariyarāya vibhāṭaṉ bhāṣaikkut
tappuvarāyara kaṇṭaṉ mūvarāyara kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu koṭātāṉ
pūrvva dakṣiṇa paścima Uttara catusamudrādhipati śrī vīrappiratāpa devarāyar prudhivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakāpdam 1000 3 100 5 10 1 ṉ mēl cellāniṉṟa saumya samvaṟcarattu
vṛccika nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tecamiyum cOmavāramum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ
vaṭakarai vikkiṟamacōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Iṉṉampar nāṭṭu śrī parāntaka nāṭu sabhaiyārum
valaṅkai toṇṇūṟṟu Eṭṭum Iṭaṅkai toṇṇūṟṟu Eṭṭum kuṟaivaṟa kūṭi niṟaivaṟa ni
ṟaintu nammil Orimai Ottuc ceytu koṇṭapaṭi vaḻutalampaṭṭu Ucaravaṭi palanāṭṭukkum Irāca
karam Iṟaimuṟaimaikkut taṅkaḷil Ottu Orimai Iṭṭuk koṇṭu kalveṭṭiṉapaṭi Ālē
nammuṭaiya nāṭu kaṉṉaṭiya vāṇam Āṉa nāḷ mutal cīvitap paṟṟu Āka naṭakkaiyil naṭanta cīvitakkāṟar
kāṇikkai taram Oruttar koḷḷāmal Aṭaiōlai maṉaintu puṟavari kūṭṭi Aṉṉi
yāyam ceytu Ikkuṭi pāḻāyp pōṉapaṭiyālē nammil Ottu rum Iṟai mu
ṟaimaikkuk kalveṭṭiṉapaṭi nāyaṉār tiruvaikāvūruṭaiya nāyaṉārukkup periya
nāṭṭāṉ canti Amutu ceytaruḷa Amutu paṭikku Iṉṉāṭṭut taḷikai Ūril
Irācavipāṭaṉāl vēli tēvatāṉa Iṟaiyili Āka naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum Iṉṉāṭṭil tāṉa māṉiyam I
ṟaiyili cantirātittavaraiyum naṭakkak kaṭavatu Ākavum Iṉṉāṭṭil Iṟaiyili paṟṟu paṇṭāravāṭai cīvitap
paṟṟu Aṭaippu nipatti kuttokai cērvai Eṉṟu koḷḷak kaṭavatu Allavākavum kaṭamai koḷḷa AḷantuHere some part seems to be inscribed over an erased writing.Iṭṭa
(ṭṭa) vakaippaṭi kāṇiāḷar pērkku Irāca vipāṭaṉāl Aḷantu kaṇṭa nilattukkum kuṭippaṟṟuk
ku Aḷantu kaṇṭa nilattukkum kār pacāṉattukku nel mutalukkuk kūṭṭum
mutal Aracupēṟu Ilakkai Uṭpaṭṭavaippaṭa nellu Uṭpaṭa vēli Oṉṟukku nellu
Aimpatiṉ kalamum paṇa mutalukku m kāṇikkai nērōlaic cammātam paṭṭavaṭṭam ka
ṇ kūli kāṇikkai maṟṟum Uṭpaṭṭa pala Upātikaḷum Uṭpaṭa vēli Oṉṟukku paṇam
Irupatum kaṭaiyīṭṭu varicaikkum taricukkum nel mutalukku vēli Oṉṟukku nellu nāṟpatiṉ kalamu
m paṇam patiṉ Eṭṭum kāṭuveṭṭu viḻal veṭṭukku vēli Oṉṟukku nel Irupatiṉ kalamum [paṇam
Eṭṭum] kaṭaippūvukku Iṟaiyppup paṟṟukkum vēli Oṉṟukku nellu Irupatiṉ kalamum paṇam pattum Ā
ka Ivvakaippaṭi nellukku nellum paṇattukku paṇamum Iṟukkak kaṭavatākavum nellu nāṭṭuk kālāl
taraviṭṭu Uḷḷūr koṭṭārattilē Aḷakkak kaṭavatu Ākavum vāṉ payir kamuku Oṉṟukku Āyirattu Aññūṟu pākku mu
tal varicai Ākak koṇṭu taram Iṭṭu payir kaṇṭa kamuku Uru Añcukku Aracupēṟu Uṭpaṭap paṇam Oṉṟu
Iṟukkak kaṭavatu Ākavum cuṟṟu marattukku tara paṇam Iṟukkak kaṭavatu Allavākavum teṉṉa marattukku
maṉaipuḻaikkaṭai maram nīkkik kāyāta kaṉṟu palamili nīkki niṉṟa marattukku nāṟpatu kāykku mēṟpaṭak kāyk
ku maram Oṉṟukku Aracuppēṟu Uṭpaṭap paṇam Araiyum palāvukku palamili nīkki Irupatu kāykkuk me
ṟukku Aracupēṟu kāṇikkai Uṭpaṭa nāṉūṟu patikoḻuntukku Itil Oṉṟu pātiyum
Oḷi muḻu koḻuntukku mutal varicaiyil Oṉṟu kālum vāḻai karumpu Aracu pēṟu Uṭpaṭa
pala Upātiyum Uṭpaṭa viḷaiccattil vāḻaik karumpukkup paṇam Aṟupatum paṭukai taratti
l vāḻaikkarumpukkup paṇam Aṉpatum ceṅkaḻunīr vēli Oṉṟukkup pala Upāti
Iñci Uḷḷiṭṭu
vaḻutilai pūcaṇi yum Uṭpaṭappaṇa
Oṉṟu tiruppa parutti kēḻvaraku Āmaṇa
kku varaku parutti ka tumpai kucumpai Ērivāy tāṅkalvāy puḻuti nelluk
ṇam cāmpalāṭina vakaikkup paṇam Aracupēṟu kāṇikkai nērōlaic cam
mātam paṭṭa vaṭṭam kaṇkūli Uṭpaṭa vēli Oṉṟukkup paṇam Irupatum koḷḷup payaṟu taṉipparu
tti taṉi Āmaṇakku kūṟu Eḷḷu Iruṅku kaṇpu cōḷam tiṉai paṉivaraku cāmai Ivvakaikku vēli Oṉ
ṟukkup paṇam patiṉayntu Ērivāy tāṅkal vāy taṉi Eḷḷukku mutal varicaiyil Oṉ
ṟu mukkālum Āka Ivva kaṭavatu Ākavum kārpacāṉattukkum paṟṟukkum
naṭṭuppāḻ cāviyumu puṉpayirkku vitaittuppāḻum cāvi Aḻivum nīkki ni
ṉṟa nilattukkup pattukku Oṉṟu Arai tuṇṭam nellum paṇamum kaḻiyittaḻitta tuṇṭattukkup paṟṟāta payir pā
rttu tarap pārvaikkup paṟṟāta payir mūṉṟil Oṉṟukku vāram peṟak kaṭavatu Ākavum vācal maṉaikkuk koḷ
ḷāta maṉai nīkki niṉṟa maṉaikku vilai Ācaṟuti vācal paṇattukkup pala Upātiyum Uṭpaṭa nāṭṭār pēṟ
ku maṉai Oṉṟukku paṇam mūṉṟum tantarimār pēṟku maṉai Oṉṟukkup paṇam Oṉṟu Araiyum
kuṭi makkaḷ pēṟku maṉai Oṉṟukku paṇam Oṉṟu Araiyum Āka Ivvakaikkuc cāyppukku Itil Oṉṟu pātiyu
m Iṟukkak kaṭavatākavum paṟṟaṭaikkuc ceṭṭikaḷ pēṟku Aracu pēṟu vaṭṭam kāṇikkai Uṭpaṭa mutalp pēṟ
kup pēr Oṉṟukkup paṇam mūṉṟum Āyattukku mutalp pēṟku pēr Oṉṟukkup paṇam nālum kaiykōḷar
pēṟku taṟi Oṉṟukkup pala Upātiyum Uṭpaṭap paṇam nālum Aṭaitaṟikku Itil Oṉṟu pātiyum
cēṉaik kaṭaiyār pērkup pala Upātiyum Uṭpaṭap pēr Oṉṟukkup paṇammūṉṟum cālikar nilaittaṟi
yār pēṟkuppala Upātiyum Uṭpaṭa taṟi Oṉṟukkup paṇam Oṉpatum niyāyattār pēṟku pala Upātiyum
Uṭpaṭat taṟi Oṉṟukkup paṇam Añcum maṉṟāṭikaḷ pērkkup pēr Oṉṟukkup paṇam Arai
yum komput taṟikkup pala Upātiyum Uṭpaṭa taṟi Oṉṟukku paṇam mūṉṟum Aṭaitaṟikku Itil O
ṉṟu pātiyum Iṟukkak kaṭavatākavum kollaṉ taccaṉ taṭṭāṉ Ivarkaḷ pēṟku kottuk kīṟṟu Aracu
pēṟu kāṇikkai Uṭpaṭap pēr Oṉṟukkup paṇam Añcum kucavaṉ pēṟkut tirikaiāyam Uṭpaṭa mutalu
kku pēr Oṉṟum paṇam Añcum nāvitaṉ pēṟkuk karuvi Āyam Uṭpaṭṭa mutalukkum pēr Oṉṟu
kkup paṇam nālum vaṇṇāṉ pēṟku kallāyam Uṭpaṭṭa mutalukku pēr Oṉṟukkum paṇam nālum
kaṉṉakkāṉ pēṟku pala Upātiyum Uṭpaṭa pēr Oṉṟukkup paṇam Āṟum cekku vāṇiyar pēṟku
karu Āyam Uṭpaṭṭa mutalukkup paṇam Irupatum kuḷavaṭai maṭuvaṭaikku Ēḻu paṇamum paṟaiyar pēṟku
Uḻamaippaṟaiyar nīkki kaiviṉaippaṟaiyar pēṟku pēr Oṉṟukkup paṇam Araiyum Āka Ivvakaip paṭi Iṟu
kkak kaṭavatu Ākavum cāravalaikkāṟar pēṟku payir kaṇṭu Iṟukkak kaṭavatu Ākavum paṭaippaṟṟu cīvitappaṟṟukku In
ta vakaiyil Oṉṟu mukkāl Iṟukkak kaṭavatu Ākavum tiruppuḷḷam pūtaṅkuṭip perumāḷ valvillirāmap perumāḷu
kkup periya nāṭṭāṉ canti Amutu ceytaruḷa Amutu paṭikku Iṉṉāṭṭil taḷikai Ūril Irāca vipāṭaṉāl Arai nilam tiruvi
ṭai Āṭṭam Iṟaiyili Āka naṭakkak kaṭavatu Ākavum Inta kalveṭṭuppaṭi cantiṟātitavaraiyum naṭakkak kaṭavatu Āka
vum Inta kal veṭṭuppaṭi Oḻittu maṉaintu koṇṭāruṇṭāṉāl maṇṭalañ cērak kūṭic ceytu koḷḷa
kkaṭavatu Ākavum Immaṇṭalattil Iyāvar Oruvar kuttokai nipatti cērvai Eṉṟu koṇṭu niṟkak kaṭavatu A
llavākavum Ippaṭikku nammil Orimai Ottuc ceytu koṇṭa kalveṭṭukku Akitam ceytār Uṇṭāṉāl
keṅkaik karaiyil kārām pacuvaikkoṉṟa pāvattilē pōka kaṭavār Ākavum ..
Digital edition of SII 34.59 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
